competencies: Develop and implement IT strategies for businesses
Apply PRINCE2 and agile project management methodologies
Manage multi-project, program and portfolio environments
Lead organizational change using models such as ADKAR
Address IT governance, compliance and stakeholder management in global IT projects
description_en: Master-level course on managing large global IT systems, covering IT strategy, project and portfolio management, governance, and change management in international companies.

competencies: Independently solve a complex research or applied problem using scientific methods
Analyze a problem statement and compare possible solution approaches
Develop and critically evaluate an original solution
Assess results and their potential consequences
Explain findings and defend decisions and interpretations
description_en: Master's thesis in which students independently develop an original scientific solution to a research or applied problem and defend their results.

competencies: Develop and operate large and small language model applications following MLOps practices
Use container-based virtualization such as Docker
Apply configuration and automation tooling to LLM workflows
Implement CI/CD pipelines for LLM solutions
Test, deploy and support LLM-based systems with Python
description_en: Advanced course on applying MLOps practices to develop, test, automate and operate large and small language model applications.

competencies: Apply narrative visualization methods for science communication
Design and present data-driven stories
Select appropriate story-generation concepts and tools
Communicate research findings to varied audiences visually
description_en: Seminar on narrative visualization techniques and tools for telling data-driven stories that support science communication.

competencies: Define and formulate goals and apply time-management methods
Conduct a systematic literature review
Identify and formulate research hypotheses
Structure and write a scientific publication or research proposal
Present research and apply teamwork and project-management practices
description_en: Course teaching scientific working methods and transferable soft skills including literature review, scientific writing, presentation, time and project management.

competencies: Understand the architecture of parallel storage systems
Optimize applications for I/O performance
Apply core concepts of parallel I/O
Build file systems with different persistence approaches in teams
Present technical solutions and results
description_en: Course on the architecture of parallel storage systems and parallel I/O, optimizing applications for I/O performance on high-performance computing platforms.

competencies: Independently acquire knowledge through research of scientific literature
Write a scientific paper with minimal supervision
Present research results and defend arguments in scientific discussion
Follow the steps of crafting a scientific publication from topic to conference
description_en: Seminar in which students independently research a current business-informatics topic, write a scientific paper, and present and defend their results.

competencies: Understand the business context and types of recommender systems
Apply advanced recommendation methods
Critically evaluate recommenders from mining and business perspectives
Account for adaptation and temporal behaviour in recommenders
Critically appraise off-the-shelf and state-of-the-art recommendation methods
description_en: Advanced course on learning and evaluation methods for recommender systems, covering recommendation techniques, adaptation, and business and mining perspectives.

competencies: Solve a realistic data mining and data engineering task in a team
Assess the business costs and benefits of a proposed solution
Organize a team, distribute subtasks and manage milestones
Design a learning workflow, apply AI methods and evaluate models
Jointly develop a software solution and justify design decisions
description_en: Team project in which students collaboratively solve a realistic data mining and engineering task, building and evaluating a machine learning software solution.

competencies: Work and coordinate within a research team
Write academic papers and present scientific results
Independently acquire knowledge of an advanced research topic
Develop solutions on selected database topics
Critically assess one's own work
description_en: Scientific project on advanced database research for multi-dimensional data, genomics, and modern hardware, with academic writing and presentation of results.

competencies: Conduct literature research to survey an area of interest
Identify open research questions and formulate hypotheses
Structure and write a scientific research proposal
Select solution methods for a scientific question
Prepare, present and defend research and evaluate others' work
description_en: Seminar on scientific writing, teaching literature research, hypothesis formulation, proposal writing, and presentation and evaluation of scientific work.

competencies: Understand aspects of IT-security orchestration of mechanisms and tools
Independently address selected IT-security research questions
Evaluate and creatively extend existing security approaches
Identify security needs for a given application case and propose improvements
Implement, evaluate and assess a security solution and identify residual risks
description_en: Project on IT-security covering orchestration of security mechanisms and tools, in which students investigate, implement and evaluate solutions for an application case.

competencies: Read and critically discuss scientific articles on predictive maintenance
Compare predictive-maintenance methods and weigh their pros and cons
Summarize article contents in a structured report
Present findings and answer audience questions
Reflect on challenges in predictive maintenance
description_en: Seminar on advanced predictive-maintenance topics in which students read, compare, summarize and present scientific articles and reflect on key methods.

competencies: Collect and judge the relevance of literature on a specific topic
Compare data-mining methods, workflows and frameworks against criteria
Formulate evaluation criteria independently
Critically discuss advantages and caveats of published mining methods
Summarize and present findings to varied audiences
description_en: Seminar on advanced knowledge-mining and data-mining topics, training students to collect, compare, critically discuss and present scientific literature.

competencies: Independently research complex sensor-network topics
Write clear scientific articles
Present informative scientific talks
Understand challenges and methods in sensor networks
Relate sensor-network methods to practical applications
description_en: Seminar on sensor networks in which students research challenges and methods, write a scientific article, and present application-specific network designs.

competencies: Understand software-defined networking concepts and architecture
Explain SDN concepts to others
Apply SDN concepts in theoretical and practical use cases
Work with network virtualization, slicing and NFV
Configure OpenFlow controllers and software switches
description_en: Course on software-defined networking covering SDN architecture, interfaces, network and function virtualization, OpenFlow controllers, and SDN security.

competencies: Understand core problems in industrial robotics
Apply mathematical modeling principles to robot motion
Program industrial robots for varied tasks
Develop a robot controller in a simulation environment
Implement point-to-point and linear motion control
description_en: Course on software development for industrial robotics, emphasizing mathematical modeling and developing a robot controller with PTP and linear motion in simulation.

competencies: Understand swarm intelligence concepts and definitions
Develop swarm algorithms for aggregation, movement and tracking
Apply swarm methods to optimization problems
Understand collective decision-making foundations
Implement, analyze and evaluate swarm algorithms across applications
description_en: Course on swarm intelligence in technical systems, covering swarm algorithms, collective decision-making, optimization, and applications including swarm robotics.

competencies: Understand the theory of serializability
Apply transaction-management strategies for relational databases
Assess the performance of transaction protocols across use cases
Understand database backup and recovery mechanisms
Apply distributed and advanced transaction-processing principles
description_en: Course on transaction processing covering serializability theory, concurrency control, recovery, replication, and transactions in distributed database systems.

competencies: Understand challenges of advanced and future user interfaces
Analyze and evaluate interaction technologies and techniques
Select suitable technologies for 3D and Post-WIMP interfaces
Apply tangible, gestural and multitouch interaction techniques
Critically analyze scientific HCI literature and conduct own research
description_en: Course on three-dimensional and advanced Post-WIMP user interfaces, covering tangible, gestural, multitouch, pen-based and augmented-reality interaction techniques.

competencies: Apply machine learning methods and visualize their results
Analyze financial and business data using visual analytics
Use statistical methods to improve visual analytics solutions
Assess and compare clustering methods
Design visual analytics with decision trees and association rules
description_en: Course on visual analytics combining machine learning and visualization to analyze financial and business data via clustering, decision trees and association rules.

competencies: Know visual analytics solutions used in public healthcare
Interpret and evaluate public healthcare data
Present and explain visual analytics solutions for healthcare scenarios
Apply visual analytics in epidemiology and clinical medicine
description_en: Seminar on applying visual analytics to public-health and clinical data, covering epidemiology, clinical medicine, and detection of adverse drug effects.

competencies: Understand how visual perception affects visualization effectiveness
Apply basic visualization techniques and algorithms
Generate appropriate visualizations for business and statistical data
Visualize multi-dimensional and volume data
Design dashboards and information visualizations
description_en: Course on visualization fundamentals covering visual perception, basic algorithms, volume and information visualization, and dashboard design for data analysis.

competencies: Work with UNIX operating systems
Use container-based virtualization such as Docker
Program in higher-level languages such as Python
Apply configuration and automation tools such as Ansible, Salt and Terraform
Implement CI/CD and design, test and support cloud IT systems
description_en: Course on cloud and DevOps technologies, covering UNIX, Docker, Python automation with Ansible, Salt and Terraform, and continuous integration and delivery.

competencies: Understand modern surgical and interventional imaging technologies
Apply surgical tracking, calibration and registration methods
Design and develop surgical planning and navigation systems
Write a state-of-the-art report on computer-assisted surgery
Read, analyze and summarize scientific papers
description_en: Course on computer-assisted surgery covering interventional imaging, tracking, calibration and registration, and the design of surgical planning and navigation systems.

competencies: Work in practice with data and knowledge engineering approaches
Perform a state-of-the-art literature review on a given topic
Apply machine learning techniques to a hands-on problem
Describe a data and knowledge engineering task as a scientific paper
Present and defend a practical project
description_en: Seminar applying data and knowledge engineering and machine learning to a hands-on problem in information retrieval, NLP or human-AI interaction, resulting in a paper.

competencies: Understand embodied interfaces and contextualize them within HCI and immersive systems
Design and implement a spatial interaction prototype in an immersive environment
Justify interface decisions using perceptual, motor and cognitive principles
Empirically evaluate an immersive interaction system
Integrate design and engineering perspectives for embodied interfaces
description_en: Course on embodied interfaces in immersive XR spaces, covering embodiment and presence, multisensory paradigms, and prototyping and evaluating spatial interaction.

competencies: Apply methods for visualizing three-dimensional medical image data
Compare and evaluate medical volume-visualization methods
Use selected advanced medical visualization techniques
Apply interactive methods to medical image data
description_en: Course on medical visualization covering volume and surface visualization of 3D medical image data, virtual endoscopy, and vessel visualization.

competencies: Understand prevention, detection, attribution and reaction in IT security
Independently address selected IT-security research questions
Evaluate and creatively extend existing security approaches
Identify security needs for an application case and propose improvements
Implement, evaluate and assess a security solution and identify residual risks
description_en: Project on IT-security covering prevention, detection, attribution and reaction, in which students investigate, implement and evaluate solutions for an application case.

competencies: Understand the basic concepts of computer graphics
Create a rendering program
Apply transformations, clipping, rasterization and anti-aliasing
Implement lighting, texturing and visibility
Apply ray tracing techniques
description_en: Introductory course on computer graphics covering modeling, transformations, clipping, rasterization, lighting, texturing, visibility and ray tracing.

competencies: Understand human-computer interaction and perceptual aspects of VR/AR
Apply technical fundamentals of tracking, rendering and AR registration
Design, program and test a VR/AR system
Develop and evaluate a VR/AR tool in a team
Present project results and manage team conflicts
description_en: Course on virtual and augmented reality covering perception, tracking, rendering and AR registration, with team development and evaluation of a VR/AR tool.

competencies: Understand adaptronic systems and their application fields
Design structure-integrated sensors and actuators
Apply active vibration and noise reduction techniques
Implement active shape adaptation through elastic deformation
Combine materials, mechanical, electrical and control engineering knowledge in the lab
description_en: Course on adaptronics and adaptive structures, covering structure-integrated sensors and actuators for active shape adaptation, vibration and noise control.

competencies: Understand application fields of Industry 4.0 technologies in production, logistics and mobility
Evaluate the impact of global trends on production, retail and logistics companies
Identify application fields and assess potentials and risks
Manage phases of digitalization projects
Apply frameworks and tools to develop and optimize business models
description_en: Advanced course on applying Industry 4.0 technologies in production, logistics and mobility, analyzing application fields, trends and emerging business models.
